package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_recreated_for_static_lookup: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag static lookup maps rebuilt inside functions instead of package-level immutable tables.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule567NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario567Negative(records []Rule567NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
